info.title: BTN HRMS API
info.description: The Human Resource Management System API description

x-request-id.name: x-request-id
x-request-id.description: Optional request id. If omitted, the server generates one and returns it in x-request-id.

refreshToken.description: Refresh token string (legacy). In production, refresh token is provided via httpOnly cookie.

lastWorkingDate.description: Last working date (YYYY-MM-DD). Must be <= effectiveDate

roleIds.description: List of role IDs assigned to the user

permissionCodes.description: List of permission codes directly assigned to the user

roles.description: Assigned roles with id and name
Assigned roles with id and name

version.description: Expected version of the roster for optimistic locking
Expected version of the roster for optimistic locking
Expected version of the roster for optimistic locking
Expected version of the roster for optimistic locking

code.description: Mã định danh duy nhất cho role (tự động tạo từ name nếu không truyền)

isSystem.description: Đánh dấu đây là role hệ thống (không thể xóa)

totalUnits.description: Requested leave units as decimal string
Requested leave units as decimal string

cvFileToken.description: Temp upload token for the candidate CV

fileToken.description: Temp upload token for the candidate CV

positionIds.description: List of position IDs the employee is qualified for

effectiveTo.description: YYYY-MM-DD. Set null to remove end date.

items.description: Omit to keep existing items, send [] to clear all

employeeId.description: Target employee, optional for self check-in/check-out

eventTime.description: ISO timestamp, defaults to current time

employeeId.description: Target employee, optional for self check-in/check-out

eventTime.description: ISO timestamp, defaults to current time

salary.description: Base salary as decimal string (e.g. 15000000 or 15000000.00)

cancellationReason.description: Reason provided when the task was cancelled

revisionCount.description: Number of times revision has been requested for this task

assigneeId.description: Employee UUID to assign the task to

startedAt.description: Planned start date of the task
Planned start date of the task

assigneeId.description: Employee UUID to reassign the task to

dependsOnTaskId.description: Task UUID that this task depends on

departmentId.description: When set, creates a department-scoped delegation: grants approval authority over tasks assigned to any employee in this department. Requires admin-level permission. When omitted, delegation is creator-scoped (applies only to tasks created by the delegator).

defaultAssigneeId.description: Employee UUID to assign the task to
Employee UUID to assign the task to

secret.description: Shared secret used to sign deliveries
Shared secret used to sign deliveries

isTrackable.description: true = serialized units tracked individually; false = quantity-tracked consumable

delta.description: Signed delta applied to on-hand (+/-); must be non-zero

requesterEmployeeId.description: Requester employee id. Defaults to the authenticated user's employee when omitted.

assetId.description: Serialized asset id. Provide for tracked units; omit for quantity-only stock lines.

requestId.description: Originating approved request. Omit for a direct management issue.

handoverFileToken.description: Temp file token for an optional signed handover document.

quantity.description: Units to return for a quantity line. Defaults to the full remaining quantity.

recommendation.example: Ensure all active employees have a department
